heading: Repealed or Omitted
label: 16766, 16767 Repealed or Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 16766, , , , which related to International Space Station research, was repealed in part and omitted in part. Pars. (1) and (2) were repealed and reenacted as , National and Commercial Space Programs, by , §§ 3, 6, , , 3444, which Act enacted Title 51. Par. (3), which required Administrator’s report to congressional committees, not later than 90 days after , regarding research plan for utilization and proposed final configuration of the International Space Station, was omitted from the Code following the enactment of Title 51.Pub. L. 109–155, title V, § 506119 Stat. 2930section 70903 of Title 51Pub. L. 111–314124 Stat. 3328Dec. 30, 2005Dec. 18, 2010Dec. 30, 2005Section 16767, , , , which related to national laboratory designation, was repealed in part and omitted in part. Subsecs. (a), (b), and (d) were repealed and reenacted as subsecs. (b), (c), and (a), respectively, of , National and Commercial Space Programs, by , §§ 3, 6, , , 3444, which Act enacted Title 51. Subsec. (c), which required Administrator’s report to congressional committees regarding operation plan for national laboratory (United States segment of the International Space Station) not later than one year after , was omitted from the Code following the enactment of Title 51.Pub. L. 109–155, title V, § 507119 Stat. 2930section 70905 of Title 51Pub. L. 111–314124 Stat. 3328Dec. 30, 2005Dec. 18, 2010Dec. 30, 2005
